title: Investment banker and Olympic champion proposes to girlfriend in Paris with 2,700 yellow roses
description: Justin Best and three of his US colleagues helped their country win its first-ever Olympic gold medal in rowing earlier this month. On Monday, he got down on one knee and proposed to his longtime girlfriend with 2,700 yellow roses.
